note: Per-category fail-on-increase baseline for scripts/ads-audit-gate.cjs. The gate fails only when a category EXCEEDS its baseline, so existing debt never blocks. `tokens` is noisy (var()/token() fallbacks over-reported) but the ratchet is increase-only, so the noise is inert. Lower a category via `node scripts/ads-audit-gate.cjs --update` after a remediation slice; baselines only move down.
